+using ModelContextProtocol.Server;
+
+[McpServerResourceType]
+public class McpResources
+{
+    [McpServerResource(UriTemplate = "config://app/settings", Name = "AppSettings",
+        MimeType = "application/json")]
+    public static string GetAppSettings() =>
+        """
+        {
+          "appName": "McpHttpServer",
+          "version": "1.0.0",
+          "features": {
+            "logging": true,
+            "metrics": true,
+            "rateLimit": 100
+          }
+        }
+        """;
+
+    [McpServerResource(UriTemplate = "config://app/environments/{env}", Name = "EnvironmentConfig",
+        MimeType = "application/json")]
+    public static string GetEnvironmentConfig(string env) =>
+        $$"""
+        {
+          "environment": "{{env}}",
+          "debug": {{(env == "development" ? "true" : "false")}},
+          "logLevel": "{{(env == "production" ? "Warning" : "Debug")}}"
+        }
+        """;
+}
+
